data.content: Planning complete for knots-5464. Confirmed that runtime step metadata already exists (`ProfileDefinition.outputs`, `StepMetadata.output`, `step_metadata_for_state`), but built-in compatibility profiles still flatten output semantics through `legacy_outputs()` and installed-workflow prompt rendering still keys off a profile-wide output token. Existing child split is correct and no new children are needed. Execute in order: `knots-c8f4` defines canonical per-step output targets plus legacy/backward-compatible mapping and validation; `knots-0d93` rewires prompt rendering and built-in Loom prompts to use resolved per-step output metadata at runtime; `knots-9727` locks behavior with parsing, runtime-resolution, prompt-rendering, and backward-compatibility regression tests.
